name: skill-prompt-review
description: Fresh-eye review for skills and prompts: PASS/FAIL/N-A against Anthropic/OpenAI/Google prompt-engineering guidance plus an AI-authorship lens, with a deterministic linter and scoreboard.

plugins.name: skill-prompt-review
plugins.description: Diagnoses a SKILL.md or an authored prompt against skill- and prompt-authoring best practices distilled from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google guidance, plus an AI-authorship lens for AI-written prompts; returns a per-criterion PASS/FAIL/N-A report with evidence and a concrete fix. Run it as a fresh-eye pass.
